title: Stablecoins, AI Agents, and The Future of Global Banking
summary: Angela Strange speaks with Dileep Thazhmon, founder and CEO of Jeeves, about building a global financial operating system for enterprises across Latin America using stablecoins and AI. The conversation covers the challenges of building localized financial infrastructure across 25 countries, from regulation and payments to underwriting and compliance. They also discuss why stablecoin adoption is accelerating in Latin America, and how AI is helping Jeeves scale billions in payment volume while automating underwriting, customer support, reconciliation, and KYB workflows.
score_reason: Explores the intersection of stablecoins, AI agents, and global banking with concrete challenges and solutions, offering trend and tactical insights.
partner_takeaway: Readers learn about the challenges and innovations in building AI-powered financial infrastructure across multiple countries using stablecoins.
partner_summary: This podcast episode covers how stablecoins and AI agents are shaping the future of global banking, focusing on enterprise financial systems in Latin America. It highlights regulatory, payment, and compliance challenges alongside innovative solutions. Readers should watch this space for emerging fintech models that combine AI and blockchain to address complex regional needs.

title: Marc Rowan on Private Markets, Software Repricing, and Capital Allocation
